1: -- Migration: Create website_pooja_products table for dynamic pooja product data
2: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.website_pooja_products (

5:   sanskrit_name TEXT,
6:   short_name TEXT,

46:   ui_labels JSONB DEFAULT '{}'::JSONB,
47:   created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT timezone('utc'::text, now()),
